label: Transparent Indigo Milkcap motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated indigo milkcap mushroom cluster for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Indigo milkcap fungus (Lactarius indigo) with accurate mushroom forms: saturated blue indigo caps, darker concentric cap zones, vivid indigo gills, pale blue stems, subtle milky bruising, fine natural fungal surface texture, and crisp silhouette edges. Include a compact cluster of 2-3 fruiting bodies so the cap top, gills, and stems are all visible.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any cap, gill, or stem.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves blue indigo gill detail, forest-green undertones from pine woods, cool mushroom highlights, and natural texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no pine branches, no moss, no soil, no second species, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Indigo Milkcap" / "Indigo Milkcap" derived from the provided indigo milkcap mushroom motif cutout.
Reference use: Use the mushroom image in this conversation as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the indigo caps, blue gills, pale stems, and pine-woods green undertones. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals visible in the mushroom/stem/pine-woods context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 if available, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Indigo Milkcap", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data analytics, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; use modern sans product typography, clear numeric alignment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product analytics design system, precise grid, crisp UI mockup, restrained but striking analytics system, 8px radii everywhere, subtle mushroom-gill line texture, cap-ring contour rhythm, pine-shadow separators.
Color palette: saturated indigo primary, electric blue gill accent, pale milk-stem surfaces, forest green support, deep pine ink, cool mushroom gray, soft spore cream highlights. No unrelated colors.
UI coverage details: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, analytics dashboard chart cards, KPI cards, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no red/orange/yellow accents except tiny warning/destructive states derived from muted mushroom bruising, no random brand names, no watermark, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock website hero layout.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Indigo Milkcap" / "Indigo Milkcap". It must feel like the same system translated from the light board visible in this conversation, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the indigo milkcap motif and the light-mode design-system board visible in this conversation as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, mushroom-gill textures, cap-ring contour rhythm, 8px radii, product analytics layout, component language, spacing, and typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 if available, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Indigo Milkcap", Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data analytics, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest pine ink and indigo cap shadows; text from pale milk-stem and spore-cream highlights; saturated indigo primary, electric blue gill accent, forest green support, cool slate borders, restrained destructive state from muted bruised rose only. Use subtle mushroom-gill line texture and cap-ring pattern crops inside token swatches.
UI coverage details: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, analytics dashboard chart cards, KPI cards, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; modern sans product typography, clear numeric alignment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product analytics design system, precise grid, crisp dark UI mockup, striking analytics system, 8px radii everywhere.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple gradients, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no stock website hero layout.
